templates.body:
Hi [name],

Invoice #[id] for [job]: $[amount]
Due: [due_date]
Pay: [link]

Matches quote [quote_ref]. Questions welcome.

Hi [name],

Friendly reminder: invoice #[id] $[amount] due [due_date].
Pay: [link]

Let me know if you need anything to process.

Hi [name],

Invoice #[id] is 7 days out. Can you confirm payment date or if something is blocking?
Pay: [link]

Hi [name],

Invoice #[id] remains open ($[amount]). Future work pauses until balance clears.
Pay: [link] or call to arrange plan.

Hi [name],

You noted a dispute on #[id]. Attached: quote [ref] and line items.

Tell me which line looks wrong and we will fix facts first.

Pay here: [link]
Amount: $[amount]
Invoice #[id]

Receipt auto-emails on payment.

Hi [name],

Payment received. Thank you.
Invoice #[id] closed. Job [job_id] complete.

Balance $[amount] due on pickup/delivery per quote terms.
Pay before release: [link]
